purpose: Batch AI ingestion for glyph classification, penmanship flow, and live animation

batch_prompts.penmanship: Assess scribal flow, hand dexterity, copying speed, and penmanship quality. Return animation_sequence: ordered glyph ids for stroke-reveal animation.
batch_prompts.glyph_classify: Re-classify each glyph crop to Old Norse letterforms with variant tags.
batch_prompts.highlights: Refine bounding boxes for marginalia, stains, corrections on this folio.
